title: oritrophium tergoalbum
intro: Oritrophium tergoalbum, also known as the mountain gold or rock gold, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Oritrophium tergoalbum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Oritrophium tergoalbum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
